item.title: Live updating Pennsylvania 2026 primary election results
item.description: Pennsylvania voters went to the polls on Tuesday, casting their votes for Republican and Democratic candidates in congressional, gubernatorial and local races.

item.title: Who could benefit from Trump's $1.7+ billion "anti-weaponization" fund?
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche announced the creation of the fund as part of the settlement of President Trump's lawsuit against the IRS over the leaking of his tax returns.

item.title: Andy Barr projected to win Kentucky GOP Senate primary
item.description: CBS News projects that Andy Barr will win the Republican primary for Kentucky Senate. CBS News' Aaron Navarro, Caitlin Huey-Burns and Nikole Killion have more.

item.title: Inside the effects of redistricting on Tuesday's primary contests
item.description: Some Alabama primary races were postponed from Tuesday due to the redrawing of the state's congressional map. CBS News' Jan Crawford and Anthony Salvanto, along with Sabato's Crystal Ball managing editor Kyle Kondik, take a look at how redistricting efforts are changing primary battles across the country.

item.title: Manhunt forces Fulton County polling location to close, delaying primary results
item.description: A manhunt for an armed suspect in Fulton County, Georgia, forced a polling location to close on Tuesday, delaying election officials from reporting results. CBS News' Skyler Henry and Anthony Salvanto have the latest.

item.title: Rep. Massie is latest GOP incumbent to lose primary after Trump backs challenger
item.description: President Trump endorsed former Navy SEAL Ed Gallrein in Kentucky's 4th Congressional District.

item.title: Watch: Rep. Thomas Massie concedes Kentucky House GOP primary to Trump-backed Ed Gallrein
item.description: Republican Rep. Thomas Massie of Kentucky on Tuesday night conceded his House primary race to Ed Gallrein, President Trump's candidate of choice. CBS News senior White House and political correspondent Ed O'Keefe joins from Massie's watch party with more. Then, political strategists Terry Sullivan and Joel Payne join with analysis.

item.title: Off-duty U.K. cop helps on-duty officer caught in Nashville scuffle
item.description: A cop from the United Kingdom was in Nashville when he happened upon a struggle between a man trying to take a police officer's gun. Tony Dokoupil has the details on what happened next.

item.title: As gas prices surge, consumers search for other savings
item.description: The national average for a gallon of gasoline has been ticking up since the start of the war with Iran. The latest average of $4.50 a gallon is an increase of over $1.50 since the war started.

item.title: First White House reaction to Massie's loss in Kentucky: "F--- around and find out"
item.description: Shortly after Rep. Thomas Massie's loss in the Kentucky House GOP primary on Tuesday night, White House director of communications Steven Cheung posted on social media, "Do not ever doubt President Trump and his political power. F--- around, find out." CBS News' Caitlin Huey-Burns and Nikole Killion join with analysis.

item.title: Americans grappling with higher gas prices as summer kicks off
item.description: Gas prices are averaging around $4.50 per gallon nationally with Memorial Day weekend just days away. Kris Van Cleave reports.

item.title: Troops say Army ignored request for more medical support before fatal Iranian strike
item.description: Soldiers who survived a deadly Iranian drone strike in Kuwait tell CBS News the U.S. Army ignored a request for more medical support weeks before the attack. Jonah Kaplan reports.

item.title: NYC manhole cover may have been dislodged by truck before woman fatally fell in, Con Edison says
item.description: Monday night in Midtown Manhattan, a woman parked her car and fatally fell into an open manhole. Lilia Luciano has the story.

item.title: Details on Ebola outbreak as Americans urged to avoid travel to Congo, Uganda, South Sudan
item.description: The State Department on Tuesday strongly urged Americans to avoid travel to Congo, Uganda and South Sudan because of the Ebola outbreak there. More than 130 people have already died. Mark Strassmann has more.

item.title: DOJ's settlement with Trump bans IRS from taking action over his old tax returns
item.description: The Internal Revenue Service is permanently barred from pursuing claims against President Trump or his company based on prior tax returns, part of a controversial settlement deal between the Justice Department and Mr. Trump.

item.title: 5/19: The Takeout with Major Garrett
item.description: Major primary elections held in multiple states; Acting AG Todd Blanche faces scrutiny at Senate hearing.

item.title: Blanche faces backlash over "anti-weaponization" fund at Senate hearing
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche took questions Tuesday on President Trump's new $1.8 billion fund designed for people who the Justice Department says "suffered weaponization and lawfare" under the Biden administration. Nikole Killion has more.

item.title: Rep. Thomas Massie loses Kentucky House GOP primary to Ed Gallrein, CBS News projects
item.description: CBS News projects that Rep. Thomas Massie has lost Kentucky's House primary to former Navy SEAL Ed Gallrein, the latest Republican incumbent to fall to a Trump-backed candidate. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe and Anthony Salvanto have the latest.

item.title: San Diego Islamic Center victims ID'd, security guard remembered as hero
item.description: A security guard who was among the victims killed in a shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego is being hailed for his heroism and bravery during the attack.

item.title: Imam of San Diego mosque says his community has seen a rise in Islamophobia
item.description: The imam of a San Diego mosque that was targeted in Monday's shooting​ told CBS News that his community has seen a rise in "Islamophobia and anti-Muslim sentiment" in recent years.

item.title: New video shows engine falling off UPS cargo plane during 2025 Louisville crash
item.description: The NTSB released new video Tuesday showing the moment a left-side engine fell off a UPS cargo flight during takeoff before the plane crashed, killing 15 people in Kentucky last November. Kris Van Cleave reports.

item.title: Victims of San Diego Islamic Center shooting hailed as heroes
item.description: New details are coming out about the victims in Monday's shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego. Lana Zak reports.

item.title: Multiple wildfires erupt across Southern California and western U.S.
item.description: Multiple wildfires have broken out across the western United States. Matt Gutman has the latest from California.

item.title: What to know about today's primaries in Georgia, Kentucky and more
item.description: Polls have closed for primaries in several states on Tuesday, including the most expensive House primary in history.

item.title: Gen Z struggling to keep up with high cost of living, survey finds
item.description: Adulting can be expensive, and a new survey shows Generation Z is having trouble keeping up. Will Smayda, head of financial centers at Bank of America, joins to unpack the data.

item.title: Mosque shooting victims hailed as heroes for preventing further violence
item.description: Police and federal authorities are working to piece together the events leading up to Monday's deadly shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego, as well as what exactly happened during the attack. CBS News' Anna Schecter has the details.

item.title: The story of Cuba's 1996 shootdown that could lead to Raúl Castro's indictment
item.description: Thirty years ago, a Cuban fighter jet shot down two civilian planes operated by Florida-based exile group Brothers to the Rescue, an incident that inflamed U.S.-Cuba relations.

item.title: Teen attackers in mosque shooting were wallowing in hate, investigators say
item.description: "These subjects did not discriminate in who they hated," said Mark Remily, special agent in charge of the FBI's San Diego Field Office.

item.title: 5/19: CBS Evening News
item.description: Multiple wildfires erupt across Southern California and western U.S.; victims of San Diego Islamic Center shooting hailed as heroes.

item.title: Who's who in Cuba's leadership? Here are the names to know.
item.description: President Trump has been openly mulling a takeover of Cuba similar to the operation that toppled Venezuela's Nicolás Madoro. What it would mean for the regime's leaders remains to be seen. Here are some of the figures to watch.
